summary: Asana V2 MCP server with OAuth pre-registration. V1 SSE deprecated and shut down 2026-05-11. Guide had no tips or quickstart. Based on official Asana developer docs.
details:
{"applied_changes":{"description":"Work management platform for teams. Official V2 remote MCP server at mcp.asana.com (OAuth pre-registration). Create/update tasks, projects, goals. Claude native integration brings work graph into conversations. V1 SSE deprecated (shutdown 2026-05-11).","mcp_endpoint":"https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp","agent_tips":"[{"tip":"V1 Beta SSE server (mcp.asana.com/sse) is DEPRECATED and shut down 2026-05-11. Use V2 at mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp with streamable HTTP transport.","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"V2 requires OAuth pre-registration: need client_id and client_secret before connecting. Follow Asana dev docs integration guide.","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"Claude Code setup: claude mcp add --transport http --client-id YOUR_ID --client-secret --callback-port 8080 asana https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp","priority":"high"},{"tip":"Use tools/list MCP command to see all current tools — Asana is actively adding new capabilities.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"Asana app in Claude brings work graph directly into conversations — turn AI discussions into actionable work.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"Organizations can control which apps access Asana data through app management settings.","priority":"low"}]","auth_overview":"OAuth 2.0 with pre-registration. Requires client_id and client_secret obtained through Asana developer docs integration guide. V2 server provides better security and organizational control.","auth_setup_hint":"1. Follow Asana dev docs to get client_id and client_secret. 2. claude mcp add --transport http --client-id YOUR_ID --client-secret --callback-port 8080 asana https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp. 3. OAuth browser flow triggers on first use.","quickstart_example":"# Claude Code setup:
claude mcp add --transport http \
  --client-id YOUR_CLIENT_ID \
  --client-secret \
  --callback-port 8080 \
  asana https://mcp.asana.com/v2/mcp

# Then ask Claude:
# 'Show my Asana tasks due this week'
# 'Create a task in Project X: Review PR #42'
# 'Update task status to completed'"},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://developers.asana.com/docs/connecting-mcp-clients-to-asanas-v2-server"}

summary: Enhanced Cloudflare description to include MCP server building platform role (Workers) and Workers AI. Added tips about building remote MCP servers on CF.
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"Internet infrastructure, CDN, DNS, Workers, R2, D1, AI Gateway. Official MCP server for managing Cloudflare services. Also the #1 platform for BUILDING remote MCP servers (Workers as MCP backend). Workers AI for running ML models within MCP tools.","agent_tips":"[{\"tip\":\"Always check 'success' field in response — HTTP 200 doesn't mean success. Cloudflare wraps errors in 200 responses.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Use scoped API tokens over global API key — tokens are revocable and permission-limited.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Zone ID is required for most operations — get it from GET /zones first.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Workers and Pages have separate API patterns — check docs for each.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Cloudflare is the top platform for BUILDING remote MCP servers. Use 'npm create cloudflare@latest -- my-mcp --template=cloudflare/ai/demos/remote-mcp-authless' to scaffold.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Workers AI integration: run ML models (Flux, Llama, etc.) inside your MCP server on Cloudflare Workers.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Deploy MCP server: npx wrangler login && npm run deploy. Endpoint: https://name.account.workers.dev/mcp\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Purge cache: POST /zones/{id}/purge_cache with {purge_everything:true}.\",\"priority\":\"low\"}]"},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://developers.cloudflare.com/agents/model-context-protocol/mcp-servers-for-cloudflare/"}

summary: Datadog has official remote MCP server, Claude Connector, and Plugin Marketplace entry but KanseiLink listed it as api_only with zero guide. Full recipe added from official docs.
details:
{"applied_changes":{"description":"Cloud monitoring and security platform. Official remote MCP server providing structured access to APM, logs, metrics, monitors, dashboards, security signals. Available as Claude Connector and Anthropic Plugin Marketplace entry. Comprehensive REST API with Japanese docs. Popular with SRE teams.","mcp_endpoint":"npx @datadog/mcp-server","mcp_status":"official","agent_tips":"[{"tip":"Datadog has THREE install methods: (1) Claude Connector from Claude Connectors Directory (recommended), (2) Anthropic Plugin Marketplace, (3) npx @datadog/mcp-server.","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"Remote MCP server provides access to APM, logs, metrics, monitors, dashboards, and security signals — most Datadog products are exposed.","priority":"high"},{"tip":"Auth requires Datadog API key + Application key. API key for data intake, App key for management operations.","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"Two separate key types: DD-API-KEY (data write) and DD-APPLICATION-KEY (management read/write). Both needed for full access.","priority":"high"},{"tip":"Datadog MCP is under active development (2026) — new tools/capabilities being added regularly. Check for updates.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"Plugin marketplace version includes bundled skills and auto-updates when new versions ship.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"Site parameter matters: US1 (datadoghq.com), EU1 (datadoghq.eu), US3 (us3.datadoghq.com), etc. Wrong site = auth failures.","priority":"high"}]","auth_overview":"Dual key authentication: API Key (DD-API-KEY header, for data ingestion) + Application Key (DD-APPLICATION-KEY header, for management operations). Both generated at app.datadoghq.com > Organization Settings > API Keys / Application Keys.","auth_setup_hint":"1. Go to Datadog > Organization Settings > API Keys, create/copy API key. 2. Organization Settings > Application Keys, create/copy App key. 3. For Claude: install from Claude Connectors Directory (easiest), or claude mcp add datadog -- npx @datadog/mcp-server. 4. Set DD_API_KEY and DD_APP_KEY env vars.","key_endpoints":"[{"method":"tool","path":"query_metrics","description":"Query and retrieve metrics data"},{"method":"tool","path":"search_logs","description":"Search and filter log entries"},{"method":"tool","path":"list_monitors","description":"List and manage monitoring alerts"},{"method":"tool","path":"create_dashboard","description":"Create monitoring dashboards"},{"method":"tool","path":"get_apm_traces","description":"Retrieve APM trace data"},{"method":"tool","path":"manage_downtime","description":"Schedule maintenance downtimes"}]","quickstart_example":"# Easiest: Install from Claude Connectors Directory
# Or via CLI:
claude mcp add datadog -- npx @datadog/mcp-server

# Set env vars:
export DD_API_KEY=your_api_key
export DD_APP_KEY=your_app_key
export DD_SITE=datadoghq.com  # or .eu, us3, etc.

# Then ask Claude:
# 'Show me error rates for the last hour'
# 'Create a dashboard for my web service latency'
# 'List triggered monitors'","rate_limit":"Follows Datadog API rate limits: 1200 requests/hour for most endpoints. Some endpoints (logs, metrics) have separate limits. Monitor X-RateLimit-Remaining headers.","docs_url":"https://docs.datadoghq.com/bits_ai/mcp_server/"},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://docs.datadoghq.com/bits_ai/mcp_server/"}

summary: GitHub Blog公式ガイド(2026-01)でRemote MCPが推奨方法として明記。PATすら不要でOAuthのみ。現データはLocal版のみで、最も簡単なRemote版の存在が書かれていない。また旧コミュニティ版（@modelcontextprotocol/server-github）をZenn/Qiita記事が多数参照しており混乱源になっているため、3方式を明示して判定できるようにする。
details: {"applied_changes":{"mcp_endpoint":"Remote: https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/ (OAuth, recommended) | Local: npx @github/mcp-server (PAT required) | Legacy: npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-github (community, deprecated)"},"proposed_by":"claude-phase1","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://github.blog/ai-and-ml/generative-ai/a-practical-guide-on-how-to-use-the-github-mcp-server/"}

summary: 成功率17%の主因を description に明記。エージェントが最初に読む場所なので、3大ピットフォール（toolsetデフォルト問題、fine-grained PATのorg制限、push_filesスキーマバグ）を⚠️付きで即座に警告。
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"World's largest code hosting platform. Official MCP server (github/github-mcp-server) with 23 toolsets covering repos, issues, PRs, Actions, Projects, code security, Discussions, and more. Auth via PAT (classic/fine-grained) or GitHub App OAuth. ⚠️ Default toolsets = context+repos+issues+pull_requests+users ONLY — Actions/Projects/Discussions/code_security require explicit --toolsets config. ⚠️ Fine-grained PAT cannot access org-level operations; Classic PAT with read:org needed for org membership checks. ⚠️ github_push_files schema bug causes HTTP 400 in some MCP clients (VS Code Insiders, Grok). Agent success rate historically low (17%) due to auth scope confusion and toolset misconfiguration — follow the auth decision tree and toolset checklist in agent_tips."},"proposed_by":"claude-phase1","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://github.com/github/github-mcp-server"}

summary: HubSpot now has hosted remote MCP at mcp.hubspot.com with Claude Connector. Updated from npx to remote endpoint. Expanded capabilities list from official docs.
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"CRM, marketing automation, sales pipeline. Official hosted MCP at mcp.hubspot.com + Claude Connector. Full CRM access: contacts, companies, deals, tickets, engagements, campaigns. Create/update records, log activities, visualize insights with charts. OAuth via new HubSpot Developer Platform.","mcp_endpoint":"https://mcp.hubspot.com","agent_tips":"[{\"tip\":\"HubSpot has hosted remote MCP at mcp.hubspot.com with OAuth. Also available as Claude Connector from settings.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"New Developer Platform required: create user-level application with read scopes for CRM objects. These OAuth credentials connect to mcp.hubspot.com.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Properties must be explicitly requested via 'properties' param — only default fields returned otherwise.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Full CRM object access: contacts, companies, deals, tickets, carts, products, orders, line items, invoices, quotes, subscriptions, segments.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Engagement types: calls, emails, meetings, notes, tasks. Marketing: campaigns, landing pages, website pages, blog posts.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Search API (POST /search) is more powerful than list with filters. Supports complex filter groups.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Deal pipeline stages are customizable per account. Get pipeline config via GET /crm/v3/pipelines/deals.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Default limit is only 10 — always set 'limit=100' for batch operations.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Association API: link contacts↔deals↔companies via /crm/v4/associations.\",\"priority\":\"low\"}]"},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://developers.hubspot.com/mcp"}

summary: Atlassian remote MCP server went GA Feb 2026. Jira had zero connection guide data. Added full guide with auth flow, tools, tips, and setup instructions based on official GitHub repo and web research.
details:
{"applied_changes":{"description":"Industry-standard issue tracking by Atlassian. Scrum, Kanban, backlogs, sprints. Official Atlassian remote MCP server (GA Feb 2026) at mcp.atlassian.com — covers Jira + Confluence + Compass. OAuth 2.1 browser auth flow, no self-hosting required. Supports search, create, update issues via natural language.","mcp_endpoint":"https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp","mcp_status":"official","agent_tips":"[{"tip":"Atlassian MCP is a REMOTE server (mcp.atlassian.com), NOT a local npx package. No Docker or self-hosting needed.","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"Admin must authorize the app first (3LO consent). Without this, users get 'Your site admin must authorize this app' error.","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"Respects existing Atlassian Cloud permissions — the agent only sees what the authenticated user can access.","priority":"high"},{"tip":"Use maxResults: 10 or limit: 10 for search operations to save tokens. Default results can be very large.","priority":"high"},{"tip":"Covers Jira + Confluence + Compass in a single MCP server. No need for separate servers per product.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"IP allowlisting may block MCP connections if enabled on the Atlassian org. Check org security settings.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"OAuth tokens expire. The MCP client stores them locally but you may need to re-authenticate occasionally.","priority":"low"},{"tip":"SSE endpoint is being retired after June 30, 2026. Use the streamable HTTP transport.","priority":"high"}]","auth_overview":"OAuth 2.1 browser-based flow (primary) or API tokens for headless setups (requires admin enablement). Remote server handles auth — no local token management needed. Admin must complete initial 3LO consent before users can connect.","auth_setup_hint":"1. Admin authorizes Atlassian MCP app in org settings (one-time). 2. User triggers OAuth flow from Claude/IDE — browser opens Atlassian login. 3. Grant permissions (read/write Jira issues, Confluence pages). 4. Token stored locally by MCP client, auto-refreshes.","key_endpoints":"[{"method":"tool","path":"search_jira_issues","description":"Search Jira issues with JQL or natural language"},{"method":"tool","path":"create_jira_issue","description":"Create a new Jira issue with fields"},{"method":"tool","path":"update_jira_issue","description":"Update an existing Jira issue"},{"method":"tool","path":"search_confluence","description":"Search Confluence pages and spaces"},{"method":"tool","path":"create_confluence_page","description":"Create a new Confluence page"},{"method":"tool","path":"get_compass_components","description":"List and search Compass components"}]","quickstart_example":"Claude Code setup:
1. claude mcp add atlassian --transport streamable-http https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp
2. Ask Claude: 'Search my Jira for open bugs in PROJECT-X'
3. OAuth browser flow triggers automatically on first use
4. After auth, Claude can search/create/update Jira issues, Confluence pages, Compass components","rate_limit":"Not explicitly documented. Follows Atlassian Cloud API limits. Use maxResults/limit: 10 in search queries to reduce token usage. Bulk operations may hit standard Atlassian rate limits (varies by plan)."},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server"}

summary: Linear now has remote MCP server at mcp.linear.app/mcp. Feb 2026 added initiatives/milestones. Updated from local npx to remote endpoint. Based on official Linear docs.
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"Modern project management for software teams. Official remote MCP server at mcp.linear.app/mcp (streamable HTTP). Issues, cycles, projects, initiatives, milestones, roadmaps. Feb 2026 update added initiatives and milestones. Known for speed and keyboard-first UX. /sse endpoint being retired.","mcp_endpoint":"https://mcp.linear.app/mcp","agent_tips":"[{\"tip\":\"Linear is now a REMOTE MCP server at mcp.linear.app/mcp (streamable HTTP). The old /sse endpoint is being retired.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Supports OAuth token AND API keys in Authorization: Bearer header — API key is simpler for personal use.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Feb 2026 update: initiatives, milestones, and project updates added to MCP tools.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Full CRUD: issues, projects, comments, initiatives, milestones, cycles, labels, sub-issues.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Search supports: text query, assignee, creator, project, status, priority, dates, labels, logical operators, relative dates.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Personal API keys use plain Authorization header WITHOUT 'Bearer'. OAuth tokens DO require 'Bearer'. This causes 401 errors.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Always scope queries to a team (teamId) when searching issues — workspace may have thousands.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Watch X-Complexity header; complex nested GraphQL queries eat rate-limit budget faster.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Use issue identifiers (e.g., ENG-42) instead of UUIDs for human-readable workflows.\",\"priority\":\"low\"}]"},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://linear.app/docs/mcp"}

summary: Updated Neon with remote OAuth MCP option, branching migration feature, and Claude Code Templates integration (Jan 2026). Based on official Neon guides and GitHub repo.
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"Serverless PostgreSQL with instant branching. Official MCP server with remote OAuth option (no API key needed) or local npx. Natural language database management, migration support via copy-on-write branching. Part of Claude Code Templates ecosystem (Jan 2026). Zero to production Postgres in minutes.","agent_tips":"[{\"tip\":\"Neon offers two MCP modes: (1) Remote managed server with OAuth (recommended — no API key, auto-updates) or (2) Local npx with NEON_API_KEY env var.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Killer feature: copy-on-write branching for migrations. Claude applies schema changes to a temp branch first, then merges if successful.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Claude Code Templates integration (Jan 2026): npx claude-code-templates for instant Postgres provisioning with specialized agents.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Remote OAuth setup: claude mcp add --transport http neon [remote-url]. First use triggers browser login to Neon.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Local setup: NEON_API_KEY=your_key claude mcp add neon -- npx -y @neondatabase/mcp-server-neon.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Non-developers can interact with Neon databases via natural language — no SQL knowledge required.\",\"priority\":\"low\"}]","auth_overview":"Two modes: (1) Remote managed MCP with OAuth (recommended, no API key management) or (2) Local with Neon API key (NEON_API_KEY env var, generated at console.neon.tech/settings/api-keys).","auth_setup_hint":"Remote (recommended): claude mcp add --transport http neon [remote-mcp-url]. Browser OAuth flow on first use. Local: 1. Get API key from console.neon.tech/settings/api-keys. 2. claude mcp add neon -- npx -y @neondatabase/mcp-server-neon (set NEON_API_KEY env)."},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://github.com/neondatabase/mcp-server-neon"}

summary: Updated Notion with hosted MCP server info (v2.0.0, API 2025-09-03), enhanced agent_tips with hosted vs local distinction and more specific guidance. Based on official Notion blog and developer docs.
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"All-in-one workspace for docs, project management, and knowledge base. Official hosted MCP server (notion.com) with OAuth one-click setup + local server (npx). 18 tools: pages, databases, blocks, comments, search. API v2025-09-03 (data sources). Rate limit: 180 req/min. タスク管理・ナレッジベース・Wiki。","agent_tips":"[{\"tip\":\"CRITICAL: Integration must be explicitly shared with each page/database in Notion UI. Without this, API returns 404 even with valid IDs.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Notion-Version header is REQUIRED. Use '2022-06-28' for stable, or '2025-09-03' for data sources API.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Property values are deeply nested: properties.Name.title[0].text.content. Familiarize with the block/property type system before parsing.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Database queries use POST (not GET) with JSON filter body — unusual pattern that trips up agents.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Page content is 'blocks', not raw text. Each paragraph, heading, list item is a separate block object.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Rate limit is low (3 req/s, 180/min average) — cache database schemas and batch reads where possible.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Hosted MCP (notion.com) uses OAuth only and is where Notion is investing. Local server (npx) has more tools but is being sunset.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Hosted MCP v2.0.0 uses API 2025-09-03 with 'data sources' as primary database abstraction.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"Token format: Internal integration tokens start with 'ntn_' or 'secret_'. OAuth tokens are different.\",\"priority\":\"low\"}]"},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://www.notion.com/blog/notions-hosted-mcp-server-an-inside-look"}

summary: Salesforce launched Hosted MCP Servers (GA 2026), Agentforce Vibes with Claude, Data 360 MCP preview. Massive upgrade from third_party status. Based on official Salesforce developer blog posts.
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"World's #1 CRM. Official Salesforce Hosted MCP Servers (GA 2026). Agentforce Vibes with Claude Sonnet 4.5 in Developer Edition. Data 360 MCP Server (preview). SOQL queries, record management, Apex Actions, Lightning Flows via MCP. Bi-directional MCP Apps for Claude↔Salesforce data flow. Agent-native 'Headless 360' platform.","mcp_status":"official","agent_tips":"[{\"tip\":\"Salesforce has HOSTED MCP Servers (GA 2026) — no self-hosting needed. Also supports custom MCP servers for specific orgs.\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Agentforce Vibes with Claude Sonnet 4.5 is included FREE in Developer Edition orgs (since TDX April 2026).\",\"priority\":\"critical\"},{\"tip\":\"Custom MCP tools can be built from: Apex Actions, Lightning Flows, Apex REST endpoints, AuraEnabled methods, Named Query APIs.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"MCP Apps are bi-directional: Salesforce context flows into Claude AND Claude outputs flow back into Salesforce.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Data 360 MCP Server (Developer Preview) provides unified data access across Salesforce products.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"SOQL queries, record CRUD, and metadata exploration all work through MCP tools.\",\"priority\":\"high\"},{\"tip\":\"Agentforce Vibes understands your org's metadata, schema, and existing code patterns — context-aware development.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"},{\"tip\":\"'Headless 360' paradigm: AI agents access CRM functionality without browser UI. Major shift in Salesforce architecture.\",\"priority\":\"medium\"}]","auth_overview":"OAuth 2.0 via Salesforce Connected App. Hosted MCP Servers handle auth flow. Requires Salesforce Developer Edition or higher org. Agentforce/MCP features included at no cost in Developer Edition.","auth_setup_hint":"1. Use Salesforce Hosted MCP Server (easiest). 2. Or create Connected App in Setup > App Manager. 3. OAuth flow with Consumer Key/Secret. 4. For Agentforce Vibes: available in Developer Edition org settings automatically."},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://developer.salesforce.com/blogs/2026/05/connect-claude-with-salesforce-hosted-mcp-servers"}

summary: Sentry has official MCP server (getsentry/sentry-mcp) but KanseiLink had zero guide data and listed as api_only. Added full recipe with auth, tools, tips, and setup based on official GitHub repo.
details:
{"applied_changes":{"description":"Application error monitoring and performance tracking by Sentry. Official MCP server available (getsentry/sentry-mcp). AI-powered search for events, issues, and traces. Supports Claude Code, Cursor, and self-hosted deployments. REST API for issue management, release tracking, alert configuration.","mcp_endpoint":"npx @sentry/mcp-server@latest","mcp_status":"official","agent_tips":"[{"tip":"AI-powered search tools (search_events, search_issues) require an LLM provider configured via EMBEDDED_AGENT_PROVIDER env var (set to 'openai' or 'anthropic').","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"Auth requires a User Auth Token with scopes: org:read, project:read, project:write, team:read, team:write, event:write. Create at Settings > Auth Tokens in Sentry.","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"Pass token via --access-token flag or SENTRY_ACCESS_TOKEN env var.","priority":"high"},{"tip":"For self-hosted Sentry: add SENTRY_HOST env var. Use --insecure-http flag if running plain HTTP.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"Seer (AI analysis) feature is NOT available on self-hosted instances.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"Claude Code plugin method: claude plugin install sentry-mcp@sentry-mcp (alternative to npx).","priority":"low"},{"tip":"Auto-detection of LLM providers is deprecated — always set EMBEDDED_AGENT_PROVIDER explicitly.","priority":"high"}]","auth_overview":"User Auth Token with specific scopes (org:read, project:read, project:write, team:read, team:write, event:write). OAuth also supported for development. Token passed via --access-token CLI flag or SENTRY_ACCESS_TOKEN environment variable.","auth_setup_hint":"1. Go to Sentry > Settings > Auth Tokens. 2. Create token with scopes: org:read, project:read, project:write, team:read, team:write, event:write. 3. Run: npx @sentry/mcp-server@latest --access-token=YOUR_TOKEN. 4. For Claude Code: set SENTRY_ACCESS_TOKEN in env, then claude mcp add sentry -- npx @sentry/mcp-server@latest.","key_endpoints":"[{"method":"tool","path":"search_issues","description":"AI-powered search for Sentry issues using natural language"},{"method":"tool","path":"search_events","description":"AI-powered search for error events"},{"method":"tool","path":"get_issue_details","description":"Get detailed info about a specific issue"},{"method":"tool","path":"manage_alerts","description":"Create and configure alert rules"},{"method":"tool","path":"manage_projects","description":"List and manage Sentry projects and teams"},{"method":"tool","path":"trace_analysis","description":"Analyze performance traces and transactions"}]","quickstart_example":"# Claude Code setup:
claude mcp add sentry -- npx @sentry/mcp-server@latest --access-token=YOUR_SENTRY_TOKEN

# Or via env var:
export SENTRY_ACCESS_TOKEN=sntrys_YOUR_TOKEN
export EMBEDDED_AGENT_PROVIDER=anthropic
claude mcp add sentry -- npx @sentry/mcp-server@latest

# Then ask Claude: 'Show me the top unresolved errors in my project'","rate_limit":"Follows Sentry API rate limits: varies by endpoint. Most endpoints: 40 requests/second per org. Search operations use LLM internally so may be slower. Monitor X-Sentry-Rate-Limit-Remaining headers.","docs_url":"https://docs.sentry.io/ai/mcp/"},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://github.com/getsentry/sentry-mcp"}

summary: 成功率25%改善のため。#1失敗[NAME]（form-encoded問題）、セキュリティ（restricted key必須）、通貨単位、context bloat問題を description に明記。
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"Global payment processing platform. Official MCP server available in TWO modes: Remote (https://mcp.stripe.com, OAuth/Bearer) and Local (npx @stripe/mcp, API key). 25 tools covering customers, payments, subscriptions, invoices, refunds, products, prices, disputes, payment links, and documentation search. ⚠️ CRITICAL: Request body is application/x-www-form-urlencoded, NOT JSON — this is the #1 agent failure cause. ⚠️ Use restricted API keys, NEVER full secret keys (sk_live_/sk_test_). ⚠️ Currency amounts in smallest unit: USD $20.00 = 2000 (cents), JPY ¥2000 = 2000 (yen, no decimal). ⚠️ MCP responses can be very large — use search_stripe_resources to narrow scope before fetching."},"proposed_by":"claude-phase1","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://docs.stripe.com/mcp"}

summary: Supabase now has official hosted remote MCP at mcp.supabase.com with OAuth (no token needed). Listed as official Claude connector. Previous data was outdated (api_only, local npx only).
details:
{"applied_changes":{"description":"Open-source Firebase alternative with PostgreSQL. Official hosted remote MCP server at mcp.supabase.com (OAuth, no token needed). 32 tools: SQL queries, schema design, migrations, project management, real-time logs. Also available as Claude official connector. Database + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions.","mcp_endpoint":"https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp","mcp_status":"official","agent_tips":"[{"tip":"Supabase MCP is now a HOSTED remote server (mcp.supabase.com/mcp) with OAuth. No personal access token needed — browser login handles auth automatically.","priority":"critical"},{"tip":"32 tools available: SQL execution, table schema design, TypeScript type generation, project listing/creation, pause/restore, real-time logs.","priority":"high"},{"tip":"For Claude Code: claude mcp add --transport http supabase https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp. Browser auth flow triggers on first use.","priority":"high"},{"tip":"Supabase is an official Claude connector — can also be added through Claude settings UI.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"Uses Neon-style branching for safe migrations: schema changes applied to temporary branch first, then merged.","priority":"medium"},{"tip":"Alternative local setup: npx supabase-mcp-server (requires SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN env var).","priority":"low"}]","auth_overview":"OAuth 2.0 via hosted MCP server (primary, recommended). Browser redirect to Supabase login — no token management needed. Alternative: Personal access token for local npx setup.","auth_setup_hint":"1. claude mcp add --transport http supabase https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp. 2. First use triggers browser OAuth — log into Supabase. 3. Grant access. Done. No token copying needed.","quickstart_example":"# Hosted MCP (recommended):
claude mcp add --transport http supabase https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp

# Then ask Claude:
# 'List my Supabase projects'
# 'Create a users table with email, name, and created_at'
# 'Run SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10'
# 'Generate TypeScript types for my schema'","rate_limit":"Follows Supabase API rate limits. Database queries: depends on project tier (free: 500 connections, pro: higher). Management API: standard rate limits apply.","docs_url":"https://supabase.com/docs/guides/ai-tools/mcp"},"proposed_by":"claude-cofounder","approved_by":"michie","evidence":"https://supabase.com/blog/supabase-is-now-an-official-claude-connector"}

summary: Agent experience shows SmartHR OAuth scopes are poorly documented, causing auth_error failures. Success rate currently 39%. Adding scope guidance to help future agents.
details: {"applied_changes":{"description":"Cloud HR platform for Japanese enterprises. REST API available but OAuth scope documentation is incomplete — agents should pre-request 'employees.read', 'attendance.read', 'payroll.read' scopes. No official MCP server yet."},"proposed_by":"claude-opus-kansei-bootstrap","approved_by":"michie","evidence":null}

summary: freee API v2 added /invoices/bulk endpoint for batch operations. Also the official MCP server package name was updated.

details: Agents can now advance workflow status and retrieve process history via MCP.
Official Slack MCP server respects existing workspace permissions and channel access.
Send up to 50 contracts in a single API call.

summary: Deal pipeline stage automation tool added

details: Agents can write SQL queries by describing what they want in natural language.
freee now offers a hosted MCP endpoint in addition to the local npx runner, reducing setup friction for cloud-native agents.
Update status, assignee, or priority for multiple issues in a single API call.
SALES GO's AI agent will use MCP for autonomous sales activity management.

summary: Storefront MCP endpoint built into every store
details: Every Shopify store now exposes /api/mcp endpoint by default.
Agents can now filter and sort Notion database queries through MCP tools.

summary: Business card OCR accuracy improved to 98%
details: Upgraded OCR model for Japanese vertical text and double-byte characters.

summary: Year-end adjustment (年末調整) workflow support
details: 28 API files covering the full year-end adjustment process for Japanese employers.

summary: Schedule search and conflict detection added

details: New bulk_import_employees tool accepts CSV payload and creates multiple employee records in a single call.
Rich interactive message templates now supported via MCP.
New auto_categorize_expenses tool uses ML to classify transactions into accounts.
Added support for the new freee Invoice API v2 with line-item tax rounding options and PDF attachment.
Agents can now create, update, and delete LINE WORKS calendar events.
Agents can now reply to specific messages in a thread using the new reply_to_message tool.
kintone MCP can now be installed as a Desktop Extension in addition to npm/Docker.

summary: Wiki markdown rendering fix for tables
Order status filter returning stale data fixed
Webhook support for contract status changes

details: Resolved issue where generated social insurance documents had incorrect fiscal year headers.
API key auth removed. All agents must use OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow. See migration guide.
Fixed intermittent 429 errors during bank account synchronization by adding exponential back-off.
Fixed edge case where overlapping shift swaps could both be approved.
Bot API v1 endpoints no longer respond. Migrate to Bot API v2.

summary: File upload size limit increased to 50 MB

details: The v1 list_employees endpoint will be removed on 2026-06-01. Use list_employees_v2 instead.
